hypothesis: Frozen v4.10 monolithic ExECT S0/S1 label policy on the full fixed validation split (40 records) with Qwen3.6:27b establishes local scaling comparison evidence against GPT, Gemini, Claude, and Qwen3.6:35b anchors under model_suite_frozen_architecture_v1.
metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
Qwen3.6:27b smoke gate: runs/exect_s0_s1_smoke_qwen27b_ollama_20260522T095301Z (3 records; micro 94.7%; evidence 100%).
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/policies/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Launch via detached PowerShell on Windows — not Cursor background terminals.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Do not compare this run to GPT full validation as the same experiment; same scorer, different model track.
Evidence quote support should be reported both overall and split between exact model quotes and ellipsis bridge repairs.
